# Real `xorriso -indev <iso> -report_el_torito as_mkisofs` stdout (xorriso 1.5.6),
# captured read-only on 2026-05-30 from a DistroForge-built demo ISO
# (/tmp/distroforge-demo/dist/distroforge-demo.iso, ISO 9660, "bootable").
#
# This record is BIOS-only (grub i386-pc El Torito, no EFI alt-boot entry): it is the
# real shape DistroForge currently round-trips, and it documents the very gap that the
# source-record delegation closes -- a stock Ubuntu UEFI ISO would additionally emit
# -eltorito-alt-boot / -e / -append_partition / -appended_part_as_gpt tokens, which the
# parser forwards verbatim (see the UEFI-shaped unit input in test_iso_boot_record.py).
# It is NOT a stock Ubuntu capture; re-capture from a real target ISO when one is on hand.
-V 'distroforge-demo'
--modification-date='2026052900075400'
-partition_cyl_align off
-partition_offset 16
-G --interval:local_fs:0s-15s:zero_mbrpt:'/tmp/distroforge-demo/dist/distroforge-demo.iso'
-iso_mbr_part_type 0xcd
-c '/boot.catalog'
-b '/boot/grub/i386-pc/eltorito.img'
-no-emul-boot
-boot-load-size 4
-boot-info-table
